meta.title: Sliding Door Systems | PSk, Lift & Slide | DECA Windows
meta.description: Three innovative sliding door systems for any application — from standard patio doors to panoramic 20-foot openings. Manufactured in Massachusetts.

hero.heading: Sliding Door Systems
hero.subheading: Three innovative systems for any application — from standard patio doors to panoramic 20-foot openings. Seamless indoor-outdoor living with European engineering.

systems.title: GEALAN Sliding Systems
systems.subtitle: Built on GEALAN profile technology — German-engineered for decades of smooth, reliable performance.

items.title: GEALAN S 9000 Lift & Slide
items.desc: Premium panoramic system. Threshold-free floor connection for seamless indoor-outdoor living.

items.title: GEALAN-SMOOVIO
items.desc: Next-generation sliding with impermeable closure. Space-saving design with exceptional thermal performance.

items.title: GEALAN Multi-Slide
items.desc: Flexible 2–6 panel configurations for maximum opening possibilities. Multiple stacking directions.

items.title: PSk Parallel Slide
items.desc: Space-efficient parallel sliding for standard openings. Smooth operation with reliable GEALAN engineering.

plisse.title: Plissé Retractable Insect Screens
plisse.description: All sliding door systems can be equipped with pleated (plissé) insect screens — retractable mesh that folds neatly to the side when not in use. Ideal for large openings where traditional screens are impractical.

gallery.title: Sliding Doors in Real Homes
gallery.subtitle: DECA doors installed across New England.

items.title: Sliding vs French Doors
items.desc: Which door type is right for your home? A practical comparison.

items.title: Choosing the Right Sliding System
items.desc: PSk vs Lift & Slide vs Roto Inova — which fits your project?

items.title: Sliding Door Maintenance
items.desc: Simple steps to keep your sliding doors operating smoothly.

cta.title: Which Sliding System Is Right for You?
cta.subtitle: Get your custom order form, door blueprints, and detailed specification — all prepared for your project.

items.q: What is the maximum opening width?
items.a: Our Lift & Slide system supports openings up to 20 feet wide. PSk systems handle up to 10 feet, and Roto Inova up to 15 feet. Custom sizes available.
Yes. With triple glazing and thermal breaks, our sliding doors achieve U-values as low as 0.12 — comparable to our window systems.

items.q: Which system is best for my home?
items.a: PSk for standard patio openings, Lift & Slide for dramatic panoramic views, and Roto Inova for maximum security and performance. We'll help you choose.

items.q: Do sliding doors require a lot of maintenance?
items.a: Minimal. Clean tracks periodically, lubricate hardware annually. Our systems are engineered for decades of reliable operation.
